description: A ground-level photograph depicting a golf course, illustrating the land cover class "Green urban, sports and leisure facilities." The scene features extensive manicured green lawns, scattered trees, and paved paths winding through the landscape. In the middle ground, two water features (ponds) are visible, each with an active fountain. Several golfers are present on the course. In the background, additional trees and multi-story buildings are visible, indicating an urban or peri-urban setting.
